scheduling.goal: Convert concrete visual design artifacts into production UI source changes in the current repository.
intent_signatures: AI-generated UI design doc to production frontend/native UI
expected_inputs: target surface or platform constraint when provided

resource_scopes: CODEBASE: read and write project source files
NETWORK: optional Figma/design-tool access when available
CREDENTIALS: must not read, request, expose, or commit secrets

scenes: PREPARE: inspect repository and target surface
ACQUIRE: read design artifact and assets
REASON: extract design contract and source priority
VERIFY: run preview/checks and capture visual evidence
RECOVER: fix mismatches or report blocked gaps
FINALIZE: report status, validation, and assumptions
